evidence_label: public regulatory and registry access map, not medical advice

records.safe_note: FDA approved Aqvesme for anemia in adults with alpha- or beta-thalassemia; this does not decide case relevance outside qualified review.
SFDA announced registration of Pyrukynd for adult alpha- or beta-thalassemia, whether transfusion-dependent or non-transfusion-dependent.
EMA published a positive CHMP post-authorisation opinion for Pyrukynd in October 2025; verify the current European Commission authorisation state before making an access claim.
This batch did not capture a public BPOM product-registration record for mitapivat; absence in this pass is not proof of non-registration.

blocked_claim: Do not infer local availability, affordability, importability, eligibility, or treatment recommendation from a foreign approval or registry record.
